titleStmt.title: SII 5.1001: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1001. (A.R. No. 136 of 1896). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyil ciṟan=ta maṇimuṭi cūṭi villa
var kulaitara mīnavar nilaikeṭa Eṉai maṉṉavar Eriyalluṟṟu Uḻitarat tikkaṉaittu n=ta ṉ cakkara naṭātti vicaiyāpiṣekam paṇ
ṇi virasiṁhāsana ttu Avaṉimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟirun=ta ruḷiya korāja- kecari[ panma] rāna cakkaravarttikaḷ śrīkulo
ttuṅkacoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 3 10 5 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattuk kaḷattūrkkoṭṭattu
t taniyūr ṣrimaturā[ n=ta kacca] turvve timaṅkalattu tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiya mahā tevarkku puliyūrnāṭṭuveḷār makaḷ periyā
ḷ vaitta tirunun=tā viḷakku 1 Oṉṟu Oṉṟukku viṭṭa Āṭu 6 10 6 toṇṇūṟṟāṟāṭum cāvā mūvāp perāṭāka vicai
n tu puliyūrnāṭṭu veḷār makaḷ ceyyūr parikkirakattup periyāḷpakkal kaikkoṇṭom Ikkoyil kāṇiuṭaiya śivabrā
mmaṇar gau tamaṉ śaṁbhu paṭṭanum Ikkuṭi tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyāṉpaṭṭanum bhāra tuvāji melmaṭattāṉpaṭṭanum kāciyapaṉ
poṉṉampalakkūttapaṭṭanum Ikkuṭi piccatevapaṭṭaṉum Ikkuṭi veṇkāṭutevapaṭṭanum Ippaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa civabrā mmaṇarom
śrīmāheśva rakkaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukku cilālekai ceytukuṭutta paricāvatu Eṅkaḷ paṅkopāti kaikkoṇṭu Itti
ruveṇkāṭuṭaiyār koyilil Ittirunun=tā viḷakku Oṉṟum cantrādi ttavar Erikkak kaṭavomākavum
Ikkoyil kāṇikoṇṭārum Aṭaikoṇṭārum strī tanam peṟṟārum Ikkoyil tiṟan tu muṟai ceytāre Iv
viḷakku Erikkak kaṭavomānom Ikkoyil civabrāhma ṇarom panmāheśvara rakṣai .
Ivviḷakku Eriya Ivaṉṉiṭṭa kuttuviḷakku Oṉṟu .
Digital edition of SII 5.1001 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
